sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n12384" key="a)pogw/nion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπογώνιον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">=</abbr> <sense id="n12384.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">w(roskopikh\ moi=ra,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:349:22" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">349.22</biblScope> </bibl>: in pl., <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">tables</tr_> of such degrees for calculating expectation of life, Critodem.ibid., cf. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:304:21" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">304.21</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
